title: Inventory Peeker [Fabric/NeoForge]
description: Allows you to view other players' inventories
body:
![Follow Project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d30fb9f38c756f88be72d04c7de8998e48fa4d.png)
---
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7222bf6a90215117e0b0f7cf9d7244a951d1b0c9.png)

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c13df5872e47cb6266ff073693a3ca8213ef48.png)

**Inventory Peeker** is a mod that allows you to peek into another player's inventory.

And no, you can't steal anything (yet? It depends on how many ideas you throw at me).

- 👀 **You** can **see** the **inventory**, **hotbar**, **armor slots**, **offhand** and **skin of the player from any distance**

- 📚 **GUIs** are **positioned horizontally by default**, as in the screenshot below.

- 🔧 **Your inventory has** the **full functionality of a vanilla inventory** (besides crafting, is that even needed here?)

- 📄 **You can pin players' inventories to** your **HUD** **(4 players max)**

- 🎨 **Inventory Peeker uses vanilla GUI textures**, so **99% of resource packs and mods** should **work without issues**

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/215d7b69cd024459df8e9c59501da52acf0ef91f.png)

![Horizontal Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f57d4d661fc1f1b8947a14311619447341634f2_0.webp)

![Vertical Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61dffd86f319ead858c6dab8a5c3a1d3cf981d8_0.webp)

![Player List Screen Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb434633203085b6863bebc4719849bd82142095_0.webp)

![Overlay Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54e6a6ee60f9e4b068dcc0ac5b2b0f1740f99ee_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Controls ⌨️</summary>

| Action | Keyboard shortcut |
|--------|-------------------|
| Open player's inventory | SHIFT + RMB |
| Open player list to view inventory | U |

</details>

<details>
<summary>Supported Versions 📋</summary>

| Minecraft Version | Fabric | NeoForge |
|------------------|---------|----------|
| 1.20.1 | 🟨 Maintenance only | ❓ Maybe |
| 1.20.2/1.20.3 | 🟨 Maintenance only | ❓ Maybe |
| 1.20.4 | 🟨 Maintenance only | ❓ Maybe |
| 1.20.5/1.20.6 | 🟨 Maintenance only | 🟨 Maintenance only |
| 1.21/1.21.1 | 🟩 Active Support | 🟩 Active Support |
| 1.21.2/1.21.3 | 🟨 Maintenance only | 🟨 Maintenance only |
| 1.21.4 | 🟨 Maintenance only | 🟨 Maintenance only |
| 1.21.5 | 🟨 Maintenance only | 🟨 Maintenance only |
| 1.21.6/1.21.7 | 🟥 Not supported | 🟥 Not supported |
| 1.21.8 | 🟨 Maintenance only | 🟨 Maintenance only |
| 1.21.9/1.21.10 | 🟨 Maintenance only | 🟨 Maintenance only |
| 1.21.11 | 🟩 Active Support | 🟩 Active Support |
| 26.1.X | 🟩 Active Support | 🟩 Active Support |
| 26.2.X | 🟩 Active Support | 🟩 Active Support |

</details>

> ⚠️ IMPORTANT: **Inventory Peeker** must be installed on both client and server! It's almost impossible (for me) to make the mod completely client-side since the player's items are stored on the server!

**[Report bugs or request improvement](https://github.com/its-disgrade/invpeeker/issues)**
